title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on York, Sanji, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kid, Unknown person #3 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Cipher Pol, Great Job in returning

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The Seraphim back to egghead island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The S-Bear can return on its own from your position.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please forgive me for the administrative correspondence because I am busy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please issue the return order to S-Bear and the mission is complete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank you for your hard work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, that's quite cold- hearted from ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have they noticed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's been a long journey ya know?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't ya let us on the island for a cup of tea or something? It's cold out here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Marine G-14 Branch is nearby here so...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Is this Dr. vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard there were disappearance cases here in egghead,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wouldn't know anything about that, would you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: disappear- once? of whom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 2 months ago,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A ship from CPS, a month ago, from CP7 and just 2 weeks ago, from CPs...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the past 2 months, not one of the government ships that have visited Egghead has returned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why is that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is that true?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: From what I remember,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have confirmed all of these ships' departures...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!! What are you trying to say?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ARE YOU SAYING WE LAID A HAND ON THE CIPHER POL'S SHIPS? DON'T MESS WITH US!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lilith! You shouldn't pick a fight with them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll open up the ports so you better investigate it then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't do that either!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As I was saying, please leave...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: KURU- PPO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I fully under- stand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Clark!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What're we going Ta' do, Lucci?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Prepare to abandon ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll fly towards the island using S-Bear's abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the moment we invade, the sea beast weapons will destroy this ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Un...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
